name: Tracing Beam
summary: A scroll-following SVG beam with gradient stroke that traces alongside content as users scroll.
detailedDescription: Tracing Beam creates a decorative SVG beam that follows scroll progress alongside content. The component renders a vertical SVG path with a zigzag pattern (down 36px, diagonal up-right 24px, down 80% of height, diagonal down-left 24px, to bottom). Two paths are drawn: a faint gray background path and a vibrant gradient path on top. The gradient uses animated y1/y2 positions controlled by spring physics (stiffness: 500, damping: 90) that follow scroll position, creating a smooth trailing effect. A circular marker at the top changes from green to white when scrolling starts, with boxShadow that disappears on scroll. The gradient transitions from transparent through cyan (#18CCFC), purple (#6344F5), to magenta (#AE48FF) with transparent end, creating a glowing beam effect. The SVG width is fixed at 20px and positioned left of content. Spring animations smooth the gradient position updates for fluid motion. This component adds visual interest to long-form content, documentation, or narrative sections where a trailing accent enhances the reading experience.
purpose: Add decorative scroll-following accent to content sections
Create visual continuity through long-form content
Enhance scrolling experience with gradient beam animation
behavior: Tracks scroll progress with spring-smoothed animations
Animates gradient y-positions to follow scroll
Changes top marker color on scroll initiation
Renders zigzag SVG path alongside content
Uses spring physics for smooth gradient movement
Measures content height for SVG sizing
visualCharacteristics: Zigzag path pattern with diagonal turns
Cyan to purple to magenta gradient
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
